name: teach
label: Teach a Topic
description: Kick off a self-directed research-and-teach flow on a topic. The user typically triggers this via '/teach <topic>'. This tool returns a structured teaching plan; after calling it, you MUST use web_search (one or more times, in the user's language) to gather current authoritative material, then produce ONE markdown lesson with these sections in order: 核心概念 / 关键机制 / 类比 / 常见误区 / 一个练习题 / 参考来源. Cite each source as a bullet with title + URL. Keep the lesson tight — no filler, no restating the topic in every section. Answer in Chinese with English technical terms.

topic.description: The topic the user wants to learn about, in their original language. May be a phrase or a short question.
